descriptor-generic=finally:1:truefalsetrue||then|after:42||function:1:||function:1:
species-abrupt=constructor-get|species-get|callback:0
non-callable=fulfilled:true|rejected:true
undefined-constructor=after-register|onFinally|rejected:TypeError
species-resolve=true|2|0|after-register|onFinally|42
receiver-args-return=after-register|fulfilled-cleanup|rejected-cleanup|fulfilled:40|rejected:true
thenable-order=after-register|onFinally|then-get|then-call|result:original
reject-throw=return-rejected|cleanup-rejected:true|throw-cleanup|throw-overrode:true
then-abrupt=construct:1|after-register|onFinally|construct:2|resolve:2:7|then-get|reject:1:true
symbol-thunk-thrower-gc=value:true|thrower:true
finally-gc=42
r3o-promise-finally-oracle=ok
